# all-features section.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes together with the code.

#[non_exhaustive] pub struct zenpng::EncodeConfig

pub zenpng::EncodeConfig::cicp: core::option::Option<zenpixels::cicp::Cicp>
pub zenpng::EncodeConfig::compression: zenpng::Compression
pub zenpng::EncodeConfig::content_light_level: core::option::Option<zenpixels::hdr::ContentLightLevel>
pub zenpng::EncodeConfig::downcast: zenpng::DowncastFlags
pub zenpng::EncodeConfig::filter: zenpng::Filter
pub zenpng::EncodeConfig::last_modified: core::option::Option<zenpng::PngTime>
pub zenpng::EncodeConfig::mastering_display: core::option::Option<zenpixels::hdr::MasteringDisplay>
pub zenpng::EncodeConfig::max_threads: usize
pub zenpng::EncodeConfig::near_lossless_bits: u8
pub zenpng::EncodeConfig::parallel: bool
pub zenpng::EncodeConfig::phys_unit: core::option::Option<zenpng::PhysUnit>
pub zenpng::EncodeConfig::pixels_per_unit_x: core::option::Option<u32>
pub zenpng::EncodeConfig::pixels_per_unit_y: core::option::Option<u32>
pub zenpng::EncodeConfig::source_gamma: core::option::Option<u32>
pub zenpng::EncodeConfig::srgb_intent: core::option::Option<u8>
pub zenpng::EncodeConfig::text_chunks: alloc::vec::Vec<zenpng::TextChunk>
impl zenpng::EncodeConfig
pub fn zenpng::EncodeConfig::with_chromaticities(self, core::option::Option<zenpng::PngChromaticities>) -> Self
pub fn zenpng::EncodeConfig::with_cicp(self, core::option::Option<zenpixels::cicp::Cicp>) -> Self
pub fn zenpng::EncodeConfig::with_compression(self, zenpng::Compression) -> Self
pub fn zenpng::EncodeConfig::with_content_light_level(self, core::option::Option<zenpixels::hdr::ContentLightLevel>) -> Self

pub fn zenpng::EncodeConfig::with_filter(self, zenpng::Filter) -> Self
pub fn zenpng::EncodeConfig::with_last_modified(self, zenpng::PngTime) -> Self

pub fn zenpng::EncodeConfig::with_parallel(self, bool) -> Self

pub fn zenpng::EncodeConfig::with_source_gamma(self, core::option::Option<u32>) -> Self
pub fn zenpng::EncodeConfig::with_srgb_intent(self, core::option::Option<u8>) -> Self
pub fn zenpng::EncodeConfig::with_text(self, impl core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>, impl core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>) -> Self

pub type zenpng::PngDecodeJob::Dec = zenpng::PngDecoder<'a>

pub fn zenpng::PngEncoderConfig::clone(&self) -> zenpng::PngEncoderConfig
impl core::default::Default for zenpng::PngEncoderConfig
pub fn zenpng::PngEncoderConfig::default() -> Self
impl core::fmt::Debug for zenpng::PngEncoderConfig
pub fn zenpng::PngEncoderConfig::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl zencodec::traits::encoding::EncoderConfig for zenpng::PngEncoderConfig
pub type zenpng::PngEncoderConfig::Error = whereat::at::At<zenpng::PngError>
pub type zenpng::PngEncoderConfig::Job = zenpng::PngEncodeJob

pub fn zenpng::PngEncoderConfig::generic_quality(&self) -> core::option::Option<f32>

pub fn zenpng::PngEncoderConfig::with_generic_quality(self, f32) -> Self
pub fn zenpng::PngEncoderConfig::with_lossless(self, bool) -> Self

pub zenpng::PngInfo::bit_depth: u8
pub zenpng::PngInfo::chromaticities: core::option::Option<zenpng::PngChromaticities>
pub zenpng::PngInfo::cicp: core::option::Option<zenpixels::cicp::Cicp>

pub zenpng::PngInfo::compressed_data_size: u64
pub zenpng::PngInfo::content_light_level: core::option::Option<zenpixels::hdr::ContentLightLevel>

pub trait zenpng::Quantizer: core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync
pub fn zenpng::Quantizer::name(&self) -> &str

pub fn zenpng::Quantizer::quantize_rgba(&self, &[[u8; 4]], usize, usize) -> core::result::Result<zenpng::QuantizeOutput, zenpng::PngError>

pub fn zenpng::default_quantizer() -> alloc::boxed::Box<dyn zenpng::Quantizer>

pub fn zenpng::encode_apng_indexed(&zenpng::ApngEncodeParams<'_>) -> core::result::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, whereat::at::At<zenpng::PngError>>

pub fn zenpng::encode_gray16(imgref::ImgRef<'_, rgb::formats::gray::Gray_v08<u16>>, core::option::Option<&zencodec::metadata::Metadata>, &zenpng::EncodeConfig, &dyn enough::Stop, &dyn enough::Stop) -> core::result::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, whereat::at::At<zenpng::PngError>>
pub fn zenpng::encode_gray8(imgref::ImgRef<'_, rgb::formats::gray::Gray_v08<u8>>, core::option::Option<&zencodec::metadata::Metadata>, &zenpng::EncodeConfig, &dyn enough::Stop, &dyn enough::Stop) -> core::result::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, whereat::at::At<zenpng::PngError>>
pub fn zenpng::encode_indexed(imgref::ImgRef<'_, rgb::formats::rgba::Rgba<u8>>, &zenpng::EncodeConfig, &dyn zenpng::Quantizer, core::option::Option<&zencodec::metadata::Metadata>, &dyn enough::Stop, &dyn enough::Stop) -> core::result::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, whereat::at::At<zenpng::PngError>>

pub fn zenpng::encode_rgba16(imgref::ImgRef<'_, rgb::formats::rgba::Rgba<u16>>, core::option::Option<&zencodec::metadata::Metadata>, &zenpng::EncodeConfig, &dyn enough::Stop, &dyn enough::Stop) -> core::result::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, whereat::at::At<zenpng::PngError>>

pub fn zenpng::quantizer_by_name(&str) -> core::result::Result<alloc::boxed::Box<dyn zenpng::Quantizer>, whereat::at::At<zenpng::PngError>>
pub type zenpng::PngLimits = zenpng::PngDecodeConfig
